name: Black Widow Snack Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the cake according to the package directions.
2. Pour the batter into two 8-inch square aluminum foil pans coated with cooking spray.
3. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
4. Cool the cakes in the pans on wire racks.
5. In a large bowl, combine 4 cups powdered sugar and 5-7 tablespoons milk to create a glaze.
6. Spread a thin layer of the glaze evenly over each cake.
7. In a small zip-lock bag, mix together 1 cup powdered sugar, cocoa, and 2 tablespoons milk.
8. Seal the bag securely.
9. Snip a tiny hole in the corner of the bag.
10. Carefully pipe concentric circles onto each cake.
11. Pipe straight lines at intervals from the inner circle to the outer circle, forming a web design.
12. Garnish with plastic spiders.
